productDisplayName: Highlander Men Classic Chinos Khaki Trousers
description: Composition Khaki trousers made of 100% cotton, has a flat front, two pockets at the waist, two pockets at the back with button closures, looped waist, and a button and zipper closure on the front  Fitting Regular  Wash care Machine wash at 40 degrees Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Tumble dry on normal or line dry Warm iron  Designed for the man of style and crafted from soft cotton fabric, this chino from highlander's Classic collection offers a great Fit and flattering silhouette, which is sure to make it a wardrobe favourite. Pair it with semi-formal shirts and suede shoes.  Model statistics The model wears size M in shirts Height: 6', Shoulders: 18"
